calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner, Alizsa Marie Taeomic present with counsel, August Rothschild, Jr.
Petitioner was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the decree changing name to Alizsabeth Marie Taeomic.
